headline: Assessing Devon Energy (DVN) Valuation After Recent Momentum Cooldown
summary: Devon Energy (DVN) is back in focus after recent share price swings, with the stock up around 21% over the past 3 months but down about 6% over the past month. See our latest analysis for Devon Energy. The recent pullback, with a 30 day share price return of around a 6% decline, contrasts with a 90 day share price return of about 21% and a 1 year total shareholder return close to 50%. This suggests momentum has cooled after a strong run. If the recent move in Devon Energy has you thinking...

headline: Scotiabank Maintains Sector Perform on Devon Energy, Raises Price Target to $46
summary: Scotiabank  analyst Betty Zhang   maintains Devon Energy (NYSE:DVN) with a Sector Perform and raises the price target from $41 to $46.
